what_it_does: Records an image attachment reference that links a design-source channel memory entry to the image asset at image://design-source/vt-property/p-2.
observations: YAML frontmatter metadata file with no body content
target uses an image:// URI scheme
id is att-d4a864e8 and channel is design-source
standouts: Image attachment metadata for a design-source channel memory
Bare metadata file with no descriptive body
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
References external assets via a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: File contains only metadata; the referenced image is not included or described
Target URI resolution is not defined within the file
No author, caption, or provenance fields
notes: A bare attachment ledger entry that points a design-source channel memory to an external image asset.
questions: What does the image at image://design-source/vt-property/p-2 depict?
Who added this attachment and for what specific purpose?
How is the image:// URI resolved or validated?
Which channel-memory entry is this attachment associated with?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches actual: it is a metadata record referencing an image attachment.
intention_signals: To associate an image asset with a design-source channel memory entry so the visual source material can be retrieved or referenced in context.
contribution: Provides a durable, timestamped link between a channel memory item and an image asset, supporting retrieval of visual design source material.
summary_for_embedding: Markdown attachment metadata file att-d4a864e8 in the design-source channel records an image attachment pointing to image://design-source/vt-property/p-2 with an added timestamp and no body content.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image asset reference tied to a design-source channel memory entry.
